notice: 1.3.2 fixes the template: New template now includes the latest layout — how-to notes on the Walls & Partitions sheets, centered cells, no cut-off headers, and the duplicate Wall #/Partition # highlight. After updating, click New template again to get the new sheet.
notes: 1.3.2 - New template now carries the 1.3.1 layout improvements (the bundled sample workbook was out of date in 1.3.1): how-to notes on the Walls & Partitions sheets, all data cells centered, headers no longer clipped, and the live duplicate Wall #/Partition # highlight. After updating, click New template again. Just click Update now.
